popularStory.headline: Henry de Percy, 1st Baron Percy born 1273
popularStory.description:
Henry de Percy, 1st Baron Percy of Alnwick (1273–1314)[3] was a mediaeval English magnate.

         He fought under King Edward I of England in Wales and Scotland and was granted extensive e …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Henry de Percy於1273年3月25日出生在英國素可特沃斯時，他的父親Sir Henry Percy II45歲，母親Eleanor de Warenne22歲。他於大約1297年與Eleanor FitzAlan在英國諾圖波藍德阿恩維克結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1314年10月10日在英國諾圖波藍德阿恩維克享年41歲，埋葬在英國越可爾希 哈洛蓋特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Henry de Percy于1273年3月25日出生在英国素可特沃斯时，他的父亲Sir Henry Percy II45岁，母亲Eleanor de Warenne22岁。他于大约1297年与Eleanor FitzAlan在英国諾圖波藍德阿恩維克结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1314年10月10日在英国諾圖波藍德阿恩維克享年41岁，埋葬在英国越可爾希 哈洛蓋特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Percy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Old French percehaie ‘pierce hedge’ (Old French percer ‘to pierce, penetrate’ + haie ‘hedge, fence’), perhaps with the sense of someone breaking into an enclosure. Percehaie is the name of one of the sons of the foxes Renart and Hermeline in the medieval French epic Roman de Renart, whose earliest known version is from the 1170s. The surname is older than that, but it may originate in a nickname for the fox as ‘enclosure piercer’, perhaps amounting to ‘chicken thief’.

habitational name from any of several places called Percy in Calvados, Eure, and Manche; William de Perci, the Domesday tenant-in-chief and under-tenant of Hugh, Earl of Chester, came from either Percy-en-Auge (Eure) or Percy (Manche).

variants.name: Piercey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

variants.name: Piercy
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Henry de Percy was born on 25 March 1273, in Petworth, Sussex, England, his father, Sir Henry Percy II, was 45 and his mother, Eleanor de Warenne, was 22. He married Eleanor FitzAlan about 1297, in Alnwick, Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 10 October 1314, in Alnwick, Northumberland, England, at the age of 41, and was buried in High Harrogate, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Henry de Percy est né le 25 mars 1273, à Petworth, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Henry Percy II, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Eleanor de Warenne, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor FitzAlan environ 1297, à Alnwick, Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 10 octobre 1314, à Alnwick, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterré à High Harrogate, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Henry de Percy am 25. März 1273 in Petworth, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Henry Percy II 45 und seine Mutter Eleanor de Warenne 22. Er hat um 1297 in Alnwick, Northumberland, England Eleanor FitzAlan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 10. Oktober 1314 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Alnwick, Northumberland, England und wurde in High Harrogate, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry de Percy è nato il il 25 marzo 1273 nel Petworth, Sussex, England, il suo padre, Sir Henry Percy II, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor de Warenne, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor FitzAlan circa 1297, nel Alnwick, Northumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 10 ottobre 1314, nel Alnwick, Northumberland, England, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolto a High Harrogate, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Henry de Percyが1273年3月25日にイギリススセックスペトウオルスで生まれた時，父Sir Henry Percy IIは45歳，母Eleanor de Warenneは22歳であった。約1297年にイギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィックでEleanor FitzAlanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1314年10月10日にイギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィックで41歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアヒグ ハーロガトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Henry de Percy(이)가 1273년 3월 25일 영국 수세스 페트워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Henry Percy II(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor de Warenne(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1297년 영국 노르스벌랜드 알윅에서 Eleanor FitzAlan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1314년 10월 10일 영국 노르스벌랜드 알윅에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 히 해로가트에 묻혔다.

mn.25 March 1273–10 October 1314: 1273 оны Гуравдугаар сарын 25–1314 оны Аравдугаар сарын 10

pt.25 March 1273–10 October 1314: 25 de março de 1273–10 de outubro de 1314
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry de Percy nasceu em 25 de março de 1273, em Petworth, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Henry Percy II, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor de Warenne, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor FitzAlan aproximadamente 1297, em Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 10 de outubro de 1314, em Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 41 anos, e foi sepultado em High Harrogate, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Henry de Percy родился 25 марта 1273 г. в местности петворт, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Henry Percy II было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor de Warenne, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor FitzAlan около 1297 г. в местности алнвикк, нортумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 10 октября 1314 г. в местности алнвикк, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 41 год и был похоронен в местности хаи харрогэит, еркшир, Англия.

es.25 March 1273–10 October 1314: 25 de marzo de 1273–10 de octubre de 1314
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Henry de Percy nació el 25 de marzo de 1273, en Petworth, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Henry Percy II, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Eleanor de Warenne, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Eleanor FitzAlan aproximadamente 1297, en Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 10 de octubre de 1314, en Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultado en High Harrogate, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
